_meta.purpose: Feature namespace source of truth. IDs 1-99 are 1h features, 101-199 are 1d features, 201-299 are 1w features, and 901-999 are multi-timeframe features. All active features are simple OHLCV-derived indicators; no geometric pattern state is used.
_meta.order: Model input order is namespace_order, then ascending feature id inside each namespace.
_meta.causality: 1d and 1w features are projected as-of to the 1h decision timestamp. Multi-timeframe features use only already projected 1h/1d/1w feature values.
